text: when dragging, can we have a round cap for the trunk of the arrow (side without tip?)
description: talking about the placeholder arrow, that's being shown on when dragging from an aim to create a connection
reflection: Added roundSourceCap geometry metadata and source-side triangle extension, carried cap attributes through ArrowRenderer, and unioned an anti-aliased circular source cap in the fragment shader. Enabled it only for temp-connector-* arrows, preserving regular arrows. Added arrow-geometry.spec.ts. Verification: 29 focused tests pass, production frontend build passes, git diff --check passes. Runtime visual inspection was not performed because no dev server was running and project instructions prohibit starting one.

status.comment: Implemented an opt-in round source cap for the WebGL temporary connection arrow; ready to show the user.
